name: Plague Sim
description: Infect and kill as much of humanity as possible before the cure completes. The agent plays the disease, evolving traits by spending DNA points.

binding_vow.description: The agent controls a disease spreading across 71 countries. Each step it may evolve one trait (spending DNA points) or pass (null action). The simulation runs for up to 600 days. Maximise (infected + dead) fraction while slowing the cure.

observation_space.description: { day, dna, cure_progress, infected_pct, dead_pct, affected_pct, countries_infected, total_countries, disease: { infectivity, severity, lethality, air_transmission, water_transmission, bird_transmission, cold_resist, heat_resist, drug_resist, genetic_hardening }, evolved_traits: string[], available_traits: { trait_id: { name, cost, tree, desc } }, devolve_options: { trait_id: { name, refund, also_devolves: string[] } } }

action_space.description: A trait_id string from observation.available_traits (must be a key listed there), or null to skip this turn and accumulate DNA.

reward.description: infected_fraction + dead_fraction * 2.0 - cure_progress * 0.5. Theoretical max ~3.0 (all dead, cure at 0%).

action_rules: action must be a key from observation.available_traits, the string 'devolve:<trait_id>', or null.
Evolve: action is a trait_id from observation.available_traits. Ignored if invalid, prereqs unmet, or insufficient DNA.

Devolve: action is 'devolve:<trait_id>' where trait_id is in observation.evolved_traits. Refunds a flat 2 DNA. Only that single trait is removed — dependent traits are NOT removed. Cure rollbacks from reshuffle traits are NOT reversed.
null (or omitted) action is a valid strategy — it advances the simulation one day without spending DNA, allowing DNA to accumulate from ongoing infections and deaths.
Each step is exactly one simulation day.

info.outcome: null while running; string when done.
info.action_accepted: true if trait was successfully evolved, false/null otherwise.
info.score: Final score object (only present when done=true).

trees.transmission: Increases infectivity and unlocks new spread pathways (air, water, birds, insects, animals).
trees.symptom: Raises severity and/or lethality. Visible symptoms speed up cure research.
trees.ability: Defensive upgrades: drug resistance, climate resistance, genetic hardening, reshuffles.

notable.Water1 (9) / Water2 (15): Water-borne; boosts sea routes and humid climates.
notable.Bird1 (12) / Bird2 (18): Avian vector; partially bypasses border closures.
notable.ExtremeBioaerosol (16): Requires Air2 + Water2. Massive infectivity boost.
notable.ExtremeZoonosis (22): Requires Livestock2 + Rodent2 + Bird2. Ignores most border controls.
notable.ExtremeHematophagy (24): Requires Insect2 + Blood2. Extreme spread in poor regions.
notable.DrugResistance1 (11) / 2 (25): Each level reduces cure research rate by 15%.
notable.GeneticHardening1 (7) / 2 (22): Each level reduces cure research rate by 15%.
notable.GeneticReShuffle1/2/3 (17/21/25): One-time use. Rolls back cure progress by 25/40/60%.
notable.Insanity (18): Requires Paranoia (which requires Insomnia). Slows cure 10%.
notable.TotalOrganFailure (28): Requires Pneumonia + Paralysis. Highest lethality trait.

conditions.cured: cure_progress reached 1.0. Humans win. Disease failed.
conditions.extinct: More than 95% of humanity is dead. Disease wins — total extinction.
conditions.infected_all: All remaining healthy people are infected. Disease wins.
conditions.died_out: Disease spontaneously went extinct before spreading. Occurs if infected reaches 0 after day 30.

termination.max_steps_note: Episode is also terminated by the benchmark harness after 600 steps regardless of outcome.

ranking: Agents are ranked by affected_pct descending, then dead_pct descending, then days_to_infect_50pct ascending.

climates.temperate: Baseline spread (1.0x). Most of Europe, East Asia, Americas.
climates.humid: Boosted spread (1.1-1.3x). SE Asia, Sub-Saharan Africa, South America.
climates.arid: Reduced spread (0.5-1.0x) unless heat_resist evolved. Middle East, North Africa, Australia.
climates.cold: Strongly reduced spread (0.3-1.0x) unless cold_resist evolved. Russia, Scandinavia, Canada.

connectivity.land_borders: Countries connected by land borders spread disease daily. Awareness closes borders.
connectivity.airports: Rating 0-3. Countries with airports can seed any other airport country each tick.
connectivity.ports: Rating 0-3. Countries with ports can seed any other port country each tick.
connectivity.border_closure: When a country's awareness exceeds 0.5 (airports) or 0.6 (ports) its routes close. Bird transmission partially bypasses closures.
